album.empty: Babu ayyuka a cikin wannan kundin tukuna.
album.delete_confirm_description: Ba za a share ayyukan ba, kawai an cire haɗin daga "{{name}}".

delete_project.confirm_description: Wannan yana kawar da aikin da kowane ɗaukar ciki. Ba za a iya soke wannan ba.

record.title: Yi rikodin
record.subtitle: Ɗauki ɗauka mai tsabta, kalli matakan ku, kuma ku bi rubutun.
record.device_empty: Ba a sami na'urorin shigarwa ba.

guide.title: Zaman jagora
guide.subtitle: Bari kociyan ya bi ku ta cikin rubutun mataki-mataki, daga dumi-duminsu zuwa jumlar magana.
guide.unavailable: Ba a samun zaman jagoran akan sabar tukuna.
guide.select_project_device: Zaɓi aikin da na'urar shigarwa don yin rikodin matakai daga nan.
guide.no_record_step: Matakin dumama - babu buƙatar yin rikodi.
guide.complete_body: Kun yi rikodin kowane mataki na rubutun. Komawa shafin Audio na aikin kuma zaɓi abubuwan da kuka fi so.

best2min.hint: Yana gudanar da bincike na makamashi da tsaftar gabaɗayan ɗauka don nemo tagarsa mafi ƙarfi na mintuna 2 - har yanzu kuna iya daidaita kewayon da hannu bayan haka.
best2min.unavailable: Binciken mafi kyawun-mintuna 2 ba ya samuwa akan wannan uwar garken tukuna.

record.takes_empty: Ba a yi rikodin ɗauka a cikin wannan zaman ba tukuna.
record.ws_disconnected: Ana sake haɗawa zuwa mitar matakin…

no_takes.title: Babu ɗauka tukuna
no_takes.description: Yi rikodin sabon ɗauka ko shigo da fayil na yanzu.

audio.delete_take_confirm_description: Za a cire danyen sautin sauti da kowane sigar da aka sarrafa.

pipeline.title: Sarkar sarrafawa
pipeline.stage_requires_extra: Yana buƙatar ƙarin wanda ba a sanya shi ba

export.title: ɗaukan fitarwa
export.description: Sanya fayil na ƙarshe daga sigar da aka sarrafa.

notes.placeholder: Bayanin tsari na kyauta game da wannan aikin…

lyrics.placeholder: Rubuta wakokin nan. Yi amfani da palette a gefe don saka alamar- meta-Suno.
lyrics.versions_empty: Babu sigar da aka ajiye tukuna.
lyrics.restore_confirm_description: Za a maye gurbin rubutu na yanzu tare da sigar da aka ajiye akan {{date}} .
lyrics.metatags_hint: Danna alamar don saka shi a siginan kwamfuta.
lyrics.metatags_placebo_warning: Ba a tabbatar da shi ba - ƙila ba shi da tasiri akan sakamakon.

prompts.preview_empty: Zaɓi samfuri kuma cika masu canji don ganin samfoti.
prompts.char_count_warning: Salon yana haifar da harufa sama da 1000 Suno na iya yanke su.

stems.title: Vocals da guitar
stems.empty: Ba a raba wannan ɗaukar ba tukuna. Gudu rabuwa don jin muryoyin da guitar a keɓe.
stems.capability_missing: Ba a shigar da rabuwar tushe akan wannan uwar garken ba.
stems.unavailable: Babu rabuwar murya/guitar akan wannan uwar garken tukuna.

import.title: Shigo da
import.subtitle: Kawo ayyukan da suka riga sun wanzu akan faifai cikin ɗakin karatu.

step1.title: Nemo babban fayil
step1.description: Nuna babban fayil ɗin tushen tare da ayyukanku da waƙoƙinku.
step1.path_placeholder: misali E: \ Robbs \ Girman kai \ Music \ ROBBS
step1.ffmpeg_warning: Ba a sami FFmpeg ba - fayilolin da ke buƙatar juyawa za a tsallake su.
step1.unmatched_files_one: {{count}} fayil ɗin da ba a gane shi ba
step1.unmatched_files_other: {{count}} fayilolin da ba a gane su ba

step2.title: Bitar abubuwa
step2.description: Bincika sunaye, matsayi, da abin da za a shigo da su kafin tabbatarwa.

step3.title: Shigo da
step3.description: Tabbatar da kwafin fayilolin da ƙirƙirar ayyukan.
step3.copy_originals: Kwafi fayilolin asali cikin ɗakin karatu
step3.done_description: Ayyukan da ke ƙasa an ƙirƙira su a cikin ɗakin karatu na ku.

templates.title: Samfura
templates.subtitle: Samfuran gaggawa da za'a iya sake amfani da su da kuma alamar meta don Suno.
templates.delete_confirm_description: Ba za a iya soke wannan ba.

editor.template_hint: Alama inda kowane ma'auni ya kasance tare da sunansa a nannade cikin takalmin katako mai lanƙwasa sau biyu - alal misali, ma'auni mai suna "Genre" ya zama nau'i a nannade cikin buɗaɗɗen buɗewa biyu da takalmin rufewa biyu.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Tsari da salo tags Suno ya gane kalmomin ciki.

tier_legend.4: Tier 4 - placebo, wanda ba a tabbatar da shi ba

metatags.empty: Babu alamar meta-tag na al'ada tukuna.

settings.title: Saituna
settings.subtitle: Bayanin tsarin, harshe, da zaɓin tsoho.

gpu.ort_providers: ONNX Masu ba da lokacin aiki

settings.gpu_none: Ba a gano masu samar da GPU ba
settings.lufs_target_hint: Ana amfani dashi azaman shawarar farawa lokacin fitarwa yana ɗauka. Tsohuwar Suno yana zaune a kusa da -14 LUFS.

guide.title: Jagorar rikodi Suno
guide.subtitle: Yadda ake ɗaukar murya da guitar yana ɗaukar wannan yana samun sakamako mafi kyau.
guide.intro: Suno yana aiki mafi kyau tare da tsaftataccen bayani, mara tabbas. Wannan jagorar ya ƙunshi shirye-shirye, matakan manufa, da rubutun rikodi na mintuna 3-5.

prep.title: Shiri
prep.body: Yi rikodin a cikin ɗakin da aka bi da shi ko ɗaya tare da abubuwa masu laushi masu yawa (labule, tagulla, tufafi a cikin kabad). Kashe magoya baya da duk wani abu mai ban sha'awa. Dumi muryar ku na mintuna 5 kafin yin rikodi.

levels.title: Matakan: -12 zuwa -6 dBFS
levels.body: Nufin kololuwa tsakanin -12 da -6 dBFS akan mita. A ƙasan wannan kewayon, hayaniyar baya ta zama mafi sananne; sama da shi, clipping hadarin ya tashi. Yi amfani da mita akan shafin rikodin don saita riba kafin farawa.

distance.title: Nisa mic: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Tsaya 15 zuwa 30 cm daga makirufo. Kusa da hakan yana ƙara haɓakar plosives da tasirin kusanci; nisa yana ɗaukar karin reverb da hayaniya.

script.title: Rubutun rikodi
script.vowels: Wasula masu dorewa - a, e, i, o, u
script.scales: Ma'auni mai sauƙi, sama da ƙasa
script.dynamics: Dynamics: fara laushi, ƙare da ƙarfi
script.spoken_phrase: Jumlar magana ɗaya, don haka Suno zai iya karanta sautin muryar ku

expectations.title: Abin da Suno ke tsammani
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, bushe (babu reverb ko tasiri), 3 zuwa 5 mintuna na tunani. Mafi tsabta, mafi wakilcin mintuna 2 na ɗaukar yawanci yana samar da sakamako mafi kyau.

suno_voice_full.name: Cikakken rubutun muryar Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: Mintuna 5 masu jagora: dumama, wasali, ma'auni, ɓangarorin waƙa guda biyu, kuzari, da kuma magana.

step.warmup_inst: A kwance tare da hamma, lips trills (brrr), da tattausan huma na kamar minti daya. Babu buƙatar yin rikodin - kawai don shakatawa makogwaron ku kafin yin waƙa.
step.vowels_inst: Riƙe kowane wasali - a, e, i, o, u - na tsawon daƙiƙa 3 zuwa 4 a wurin jin daɗin ku, tare da tsayayyen ƙara. Wannan yana taimaka wa Suno ya ɗauki tsantsar sautin muryar ku.
step.scales_inst: Yi waƙa mai sauƙi sama sannan ƙasa, akan "la" ko "na". Ba ya buƙatar zama cikakke - makasudin shine taswirar kewayon muryar ku.
step.section_inst: Rara sanduna 8 zuwa 16 na waƙar, tare da ainihin niyyar da kuke son isarwa. Ba da fifikon tsabta da kasancewar sama da kamalar fasaha.
step.section2_inst: Rera wani sanduna 8 zuwa 16 - da kyau ƙungiyar mawaƙa ko sashin da ya bambanta da na baya. Ƙarin iri-iri yana taimaka wa ƙirar koyon muryar ku.
step.dynamics_inst: Waƙar wannan jumla tana farawa da taushi sosai kuma tana ƙarewa da ƙarfi, ba tare da ƙulla makogwaro ba. Wannan yana nuna Suno tsayayyen kewayon muryar ku.
step.spoken_inst: Yi magana - kar ku raira waƙa - gajeriyar magana ta dabi'a, kamar kuna hira. Wannan yana taimaka wa Suno gane ainihin sautin muryar ku.

errors.network: An kasa isa ga uwar garken.
errors.device_busy: Ana amfani da na'urar sauti ta wani shirin.
errors.device_not_found: Ba a samo na'urar sauti ba.
errors.already_recording: An riga an fara yin rikodi.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: Ba a shigar da FFmpeg ba - shigar da shi don canza wannan fayil ɗin.
errors.permission_denied: An ƙi izini don hanyar da aka bayar.
errors.import_path_not_found: Ba a samo hanyar shigo da kaya ba.
errors.export_failed: An kasa fitar da fayil ɗin.
